params.name: Traveler Diploma
params.description: Earth's Will made a set of evaluations to find the best warriors among travelers to fight the Demon Gods. Whoever passes the evaluations will be entrusted with this diploma by Earth's Will itself and the chance to confront the Demon Gods.
